query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NULL OR description = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_desc, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_desc FROM products WHERE isActive = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qoidv3y2UAwFYa.059d504460e8 --database YYAoWxTvDsxnrHQtNTJgbZ --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NULL OR description = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_desc, SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_desc FROM products WHERE isActive = 1;
